case_title: SOPHIE LAU VS. NORMA MARIA ROLDANDEMATA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LAU, SOPHIE AS TO DEFENDANT ROLDANDEMATA, NORMA MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 SERVED NOV-02-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROLDANDEMATA, NORMA MARIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-12-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. DEFENDANT APPEARS WITH CRISTINA PENA SPANISH TRANSLATOR. CLERK: B.PAREDES. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAU, SOPHIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROLDANDEMATA, NORMA MARIA $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,575.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT ROLDANDEMATA, NORMA MARIA HEARING SET FOR OCT-25-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE OF OEX ON DEFENDANT NORMA MARIA ROLDADEMATA BY PERSONAL SERVICE. 55 FEE.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAU, SOPHIE

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-25-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR - PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY HAROLD HAND--ANTHONY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER--MARIA ARELLANO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
